creator: nbari@tequila.io
text:
The error I am getting trying to compile the port:

FAILED: lib/Analysis/CMakeFiles/LLVMAnalysis.dir/InstructionSimplify.cpp.o
/usr/bin/c++ -DGTEST_HAS_RTTI=0 -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS -D__STDC_LIMIT_MACROS -I/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/lang/rust/work/_build/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/llvm/build/lib/Analysis -I/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.70.0-src/src/llvm-project/llvm/lib/Analysis -I/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/lang/rust/work/_build/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/llvm/build/include -I/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.70.0-src/src/llvm-project/llvm/include -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -fPIC -m64 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -fPIC -fno-semantic-interposition -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Werror=date-time -Werror=unguarded-availability-new -w -fdiagnostics-color -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -O3 -DNDEBUG -std=c++17  -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -MD -MT lib/Analysis/CMakeFiles/LLVMAnalysis.dir/InstructionSimplify.cpp.o -MF lib/Analysis/CMakeFiles/LLVMAnalysis.dir/InstructionSimplify.cpp.o.d -o lib/Analysis/CMakeFiles/LLVMAnalysis.dir/InstructionSimplify.cpp.o -c /usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.70.0-src/src/llvm-project/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp
/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.70.0-src/src/llvm-project/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp:5796:26: error: use of undeclared identifier 'Gpcode'; did you mean 'Opcode'?
  return ::simplifyBinOp(Gpcode, LHS, RHS, Q, RecursionLimit);
                         ^~~~~~
                         Opcode
/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.70.0-src/src/llvm-project/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp:5794:37: note: 'Opcode' declared here
Value *llvm::simplifyBinOp(unsigned Opcode, Value *LHS, Value *RHS,
                                    ^
